steps.text: Identify the key phrase: the service can deliver at most 18 items per day. "At most" means the total cannot exceed 18; it can equal 18 but not go higher. This translates to $\le$.
Build the expression for total items: packages plus envelopes = $p + e$. Applying the constraint: $p + e \le 18$.

Evaluate all choices:
  • A: $p+e\le18$ - total items is at most 18. That confirms A is correct.
  • B: $p+e\ge18$ - says total is at least 18, meaning the service must deliver 18 or more. This contradicts "at most." Eliminated.
  • C: $p-e\le18$ - uses subtraction instead of addition. The number of packages minus envelopes is unrelated to the daily capacity constraint. Eliminated.
  • D: $p-e\ge18$ - subtraction with the wrong direction. Eliminated.
